description: A typical business report combining headings, summary box, data table, unordered/ordered lists, and body prose
visual_assertions: The h1 heading 'Quarterly Performance Report' should be large and in blue (#1e40af) with a blue underline
The executive summary box should have a blue left border and light blue background
The metrics table should have a dark blue header row with white text
Even rows of the table should have a light gray background (striped table)
The unordered list items in 'Highlights' should have bullet markers
The ordered list items in 'Goals for Q2 2026' should be numbered 1 through 5
All heading levels (h1, h2, h3) should be visually distinct in size and weight
